expectations.text: All 9 slides produced with headline, content, verbal script, emotional job
expectations.evidence: All 9 slides present with full structure (Hook through Vision)

expectations.text: Slide 1 (Hook) uses specific claim, not generic 'massive market opportunity'
expectations.evidence: Hook uses specific data-driven claim, no red-flag phrases

expectations.text: Slide 5 (Traction) leads with strongest metric ($16K MRR, 15% MoM)
expectations.evidence: Traction slide leads with revenue and growth rate metrics
Ask slide includes specific SAFE terms and use of funds
No instances of banned phrases found in output
Churn discussed transparently with plan to address
